summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.3 features completed. All requested features are working correctly: 15 comparables loading, 'Buscar más' button, negotiation slider (-15% to 0%), custom_negotiation API parameter, page-break CSS in reports, larger fonts, and 'Otros Elementos Importantes' textarea.
passed_tests: Report has page-break CSS for 3-page letter format ✅
UI: 'Buscar más' button visible with data-testid='search-more-btn' ✅
UI: Toggle adjustments button works with data-testid='toggle-adjustments-btn' ✅
UI: Negotiation slider visible with range -15% to 0% ✅
UI: ValuationForm Step 3 has 'Otros Elementos Importantes' textarea ✅
UI: Report page displays value $6,689,997 MXN with thermometer ✅
UI: Report shows 'Otros elementos:' section with custom text ✅
UI: OpenStreetMap iframe embedded in report ✅
seed_data_creation: Used existing valuation val_7348428e33a4 with 15 comparables. Created test valuations for negotiation adjustment verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.3 features verified working. Key test valuation: val_7348428e33a4 with 15 comparables. Web scraping for comparables falls back to MOCKED/simulated data when real scraping fails - this is expected behavior. Key UI elements: data-testid='search-more-btn', data-testid='toggle-adjustments-btn', data-testid='negotiation-slider', data-testid='other-features-input'.
